nodes.label: Theorem 1: Distinction Upper Bound (phi <= |M||Z|)
nodes.rationale: To disintegrate a maximal integrated mechanism, all causal connections between the mechanism and the purview must be severed; the bound equals the total number of potential connections |M||Z|.
